'''''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 1''' is the premiere issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector]]'' magazine. It was published by [[Topps]] in [[February]] [[1998]]. This issue came with a fold-out poster featuring ''[[Star Wars]]'' art by [[Drew Struzan]], including a portrait of [[George Lucas]] exclusively commissioned for ''Star Wars Galaxy Collector''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*"[[Rebel Report]]"
*"[[Back at the Ranch]]" — [[Gavin Bocquet]]: Building a Galaxy, Board by Board
*"[[Around the Galaxy]]"
*"[[Star Wars Stuff|''Star Wars'' Stuff]]" — The Sun Rises on Hot ''Star Wars'' Collectibles in Japan {{C|by [[Stephen J. Sansweet|Steve Sansweet]]}}
*"Exclusive Price Guide"
*"[[Collectors' Comlink]]"
*"[[Fantastic Fans]]" — Eimei Takeda: ''Star Wars'' Servant {{C|by [[Robert Clayton]]}}
*"[[Use the Force]]" — Tougher Than Sabacc...

===Features===
*"[[Don't Leave Home Without It]]" (Book Preview: ''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'')
*:<small>The author talks about assembling this latest ''Star Wars'' compendium</small>
*"A Visit to West End Games: [[Playing A Major Role]]" {{C|by [[Michael Kogge]]}}
*:<small>Creating games in Honesdale, PA</small>
*"[[The Creative Cosmos of Drew Struzan]]" {{C|by [[Gary Gerani]]}}
*:<small>The artist is most famous for his ''Star Wars'' posters, book covers and portraits of George Lucas. Along with a candid chat with Struzan, we present a poster featuring an exclusive new painting of Lucas.</small>
*"[[The Man Who Shot Luke Skywalker]]: [[Kim Simmons]]" {{C|by [[Bob Woods]]}}
*:<small>Since 1981, he's had the awesome job of photographing Kenner toys</small>
*"[[The Jabba Tape]]" Chapter Two
